issues_found: Source is a listing/calendar page (listing_page type), not an archiveable research document per Rule 8
No substantive macro catalyst or market structure content present
URL field is blank in metadata, violating source attribution requirement
Source name field is blank despite source body identifying Federal Reserve as origin
Page contains only dates, times, and links to documents—no analysis, no factual claims suitable for independent verification
Low-quality container page with no direct, specific facts worth preserving in a research archive
Publishing date field is blank, reducing source reliability for historical reference

corrected_fields.summary: This source is a FOMC meeting calendar and navigation page from the Federal Reserve website, listing scheduled Federal Open Market Committee meeting dates from 2021 through 2027 along with associated document links. The page does not contain substantive analysis, discussion of macro catalysts, or market structure content—it is purely an index of meeting dates with links to statements, minutes, and projection materials. This is a container/listing page that should be rejected per archive quality rules.
